button.title: Export this customer's report as PDF

section.t-att-class: 'o_lds_widget o_lds_widget_' + widget.type + (widget.span ? ' o_lds_span_' + widget.span : '') + (widget.hero ? ' o_lds_widget_hero' + (widget.hero === 'teal' ? ' o_lds_hero_teal' : '') : '') + (widget.tall ? ' o_lds_widget_tall' : '')

div.div: Nothing needs your attention this week.

td.t-att-class: matrixCellAlign(column) + matrixCellTone(row, column) + (row.cell_modals and row.cell_modals[column.key] ? ' o_lds_cell_pop' : '')
